seoTitle: Runnymede vs Rushworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Runnymede and Rushworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Runnymede and Rushworth.
heading: Runnymede vs Rushworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Runnymede, Victoria and Rushworth, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rushworth has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Runnymede (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Runnymede or Rushworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Runnymede has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Rushworth scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Runnymede scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Rushworth scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Runnymede or Rushworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rushworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
